title: Squirrel Removal in Maplewood, NJ | $900-$2,500 | Best Pest Control NYC
metaDescription: Professional squirrel removal services in Maplewood, NJ. Humane trapping, exclusion & attic cleanup. Serving all Maplewood neighborhoods. Call for fast service!
intro: Squirrels in your Maplewood attic or walls? Best Pest Control NYC provides expert squirrel removal services throughout Maplewood, New Jersey. Our licensed technicians use humane trapping methods and proven exclusion techniques to safely remove squirrels and prevent future infestations in your home.
whyUs: With years of experience serving Maplewood and surrounding communities, Best Pest Control NYC understands the unique challenges of squirrel problems in New Jersey's suburban homes. We offer same-day emergency service, comprehensive warranties, and guaranteed results to protect your property from squirrel damage.
localContext: Maplewood's tree-lined streets and charming Tudor and Colonial homes provide ideal habitats for gray squirrels seeking shelter in attics and chimneys. From properties near Memorial Park to homes around the Maplewood Village center, we've helped countless residents resolve squirrel intrusions while preserving the character of their historic properties.

faqs.question: How much does squirrel removal cost in Maplewood, NJ?
faqs.answer: Squirrel removal in Maplewood typically costs between $900 and $2,500, depending on the severity of the infestation, number of entry points, and whether attic restoration is needed. We provide free inspections and detailed quotes before beginning any work.

faqs.question: How long does squirrel removal take in Maplewood homes?
faqs.answer: Most squirrel removal projects in Maplewood take 3-7 days from initial trapping to complete exclusion. The timeline depends on how many squirrels are present and the extent of entry point repairs needed. We work efficiently to resolve your squirrel problem as quickly as possible.

faqs.question: What damage can squirrels cause to Maplewood homes?
faqs.answer: Squirrels can cause extensive damage to Maplewood homes by chewing through electrical wiring, damaging insulation, gnawing on wooden beams and soffits, and creating entry holes in roofs and siding. They also leave droppings and urine that can contaminate attic spaces and create health hazards.

faqs.question: Do you offer humane squirrel removal in Maplewood?
faqs.answer: Yes, we use only humane, live-trapping methods for squirrel removal in Maplewood. Our approach focuses on safely capturing and relocating squirrels according to New Jersey wildlife regulations, followed by sealing all entry points to prevent re-entry without harming the animals.
